what: Load sibling vault entries for uniqueness comparison
why: The LLM needs to know what other entries exist in the vault to flag duplicates and validate category/tag choices

success_handling.criteria: Vault entries loaded and mapped to {title, category, tags} summaries

error_handling.action: Skip step — proceed with empty vault entries list

decisions.reason: Optional step — only runs when db + vault_id are provided
decisions.rationale: The standalone audit route passes db context; the internal audit (called from create/edit) does not, so it skips this step to avoid overhead.
